$description: Android 15+ overrides. Material You dynamic color is opt-in: if user has set a webkitium theme we ignore wallpaper-derived colors and use user brand instead. Edge-to-edge + predictive back are assumed.

source.$description: 'user-theme' | 'wallpaper' | 'brand-default'. Runtime sets based on browser.theme state.

omnibar.$description: Compose Surface with tonalElevation=3.dp, shape.roundedCorner(28.dp). Floats above content (edge-to-edge).

contextMenu.$description: DropdownMenu with elevation=2. Material 3 does not support blur behind menus on Android without compositing tricks; we accept solid surface.
